Five Brands · One Vision

Blueprint
Studio.

Five distinct brands. One unified vision. Strategy, apparel, AI education, artist brand strategy, and virtual admin — all under one roof. This is what Jasmine has built.

01

Visual Communications & Digital Marketing Agency

JDEM Suite

Inquire →

Founded in 2015, JDEM Suite is a full-service boutique agency offering brand strategy, creative direction, website development, graphic design, and digital marketing. Serving hundreds of brands across industries with a story-first approach that gets noticed and gets results. Every project starts with the question: what does this brand need to say, and who needs to hear it?

Brand Strategy
Creative Direction
Website Development
Graphic Design
Digital Marketing
Virtual Assistance
02

AI Education & Digital Products

BrandWellCo

Shop Products →

BrandWellCo is Jasmine's digital product brand — teaching creators and entrepreneurs how to harness AI as an amplifier of creativity, not a replacement for it. She has developed comprehensive prompt library systems for hyperrealistic and editorial AI image generation, built for creators who want consistency, quality, and a professional edge. Deep in research and actively pursuing credentials in this space.

AI Prompt Libraries

03

Faith-Rooted Apparel Brand

8:15 Collection

Shop Collection →

A premium apparel brand built on the belief that identity is worth wearing. Every drop is intentional, minimal in aesthetic, and rooted in faith. Current collections include The Identity Collection (Kept · Worthy · More Than Enough) and The Winter Reset capsule (Joy Runs Deep · Still Covered · Grace Carried Me). Wearable declarations for people who know who they are.
